common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.notFoundHint: Check the link or ask the host for a fresh one.

landing.heroTitle:
Every Guest.
Every Angle.
One Gallery
landing.heroSub: Kormem is a private shared camera for events. Guests join via QR (no download), shoot photos, clips and voice wishes, and everything appears in one live gallery.
landing.heroAlt: Confetti falling over a celebrating crowd at night
landing.step1Text: A date and a name. The QR code is ready immediately.
landing.step2Text: The camera opens from a link, right in the browser. No apps, no accounts.
landing.step3Text: Every photo, clip and voice wish appears in the shared gallery the instant a guest captures it: the whole night through everyone’s eyes.
landing.stylesTitle: Three film styles to choose from
landing.stylesSub: The style shows in the viewfinder before the shot. The original is always stored clean.
landing.stylesPhotoAlt: A groom lifting his bride against the sunset
landing.planFreeText: Unlimited photos, videos and voice wishes, the live shared gallery, find-my-photos and printable QR cards. No subscriptions, no fees.
landing.faq1q: Do guests need to install an app?
landing.faq1a: No. The camera opens right in the browser from a link or QR code. Works on iPhone and Android, including budget models.
landing.faq2q: When can guests see the photos?
landing.faq2a: Right away. Every shot appears in the shared gallery the moment it is taken, live through the whole event, for every guest.
landing.faq3q: A guest shot with a filter. Can I get the original?
landing.faq3a: Yes. The original is always stored clean at full resolution; the style is only laid over it at display time.
landing.faq4a: Kormem is free. No subscriptions and no per-event fees.
landing.faq5a: In private storage, reachable only through your event link. Download the archive any time and they are yours forever.
landing.ctaTitle: Your day, captured by every guest.
landing.occasionsTitle:
Memories worth keeping,
from every angle.
landing.occasionsBody: A wedding, a birthday, a corporate night, a reunion: wherever people gather, Kormem hands them one shared film roll. No apps, no accounts. Every guest gets the QR code, and that is the whole setup.
landing.modesTitle: Three ways to leave a memory
landing.modePhotoText: Film styles preview live in the viewfinder before the shot.
landing.modeVoiceText: A spoken message for the hosts. Guests hear themselves before sending, one wish per guest.
landing.howSub: Three screens on a guest's phone: join, shoot, and the reveal.
landing.phoneNoApp: No app, no sign-up. Your shots join the shared gallery.
landing.useCasesTitle: “Not every gallery needs a special day.”
landing.tryText: Scan with your phone: the camera opens in the browser and you can take a shot right away. No download needed.
landing.planFreeNote: This is a test version. We are collecting feedback from users and would be grateful for your thoughts.

auth.title: Sign in to Kormem
auth.subtitle: The host dashboard: events, QR codes and galleries.
auth.linkSentHint: Open the email at {email} and follow the link on this device.
auth.noPassword: No passwords: a link to your email, or Google sign-in.
auth.configError: Sign-in is not configured. In your hosting env vars, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL must be the project URL (https://xxxx.supabase.co) and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY the anon or publishable key (sb_publishable_...). One of them is missing, invalid, or the two are swapped.
auth.linkSpamHint: No email after a minute? Check the spam folder.
auth.photoCaption: Every guest becomes a photographer. The gallery opens when you say so.

guestList.title: Guests
guestList.empty: Nobody has joined yet. Once guests scan the QR code, they appear here.

meta.title: Kormem: the shared camera for any celebration
meta.description: Guests capture photos, short clips and voice wishes right in the browser. Everything stays hidden until the reveal, then the whole night opens in one shared gallery.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Kormem is a free, web-only shared camera for events. This policy explains what we collect, how we use it, and your choices. Kormem takes no payments, runs no advertising, and allows no cross-app tracking.
privacy.s1Body:
Host account: your email (to sign in) and the display name you choose.
Guests: a random device token stored on your own device so your shots stay linked to you without an account, plus a display name you optionally type.
Content you create: photos, short videos and voice messages you capture, and event details a host sets (name, dates, settings).
Technical data: basic server logs and error diagnostics needed to keep the service running.
Find my photos: face detection and matching run entirely on your device. Your selfie and the face data computed from it are never uploaded and never stored anywhere.
privacy.s2Body:
To operate the service: create events, let guests join, upload and display media, and run the live shared gallery.
To sign hosts in and keep guest sessions working.
To keep the service reliable and secure and to prevent abuse.
To send essential messages such as sign-in links and support replies.
privacy.s3Body: Media uploaded to an event is visible to people who have that event's link, according to the event's settings. Your display name may be shown next to your shots. We do not sell personal data and we do not allow cross-app or cross-site tracking.
privacy.s4Body:
We use a small number of processors that handle data only to run Kormem for us:
Supabase — database, authentication and private file storage.
Vercel — web hosting and delivery.
They are bound to protect your data and use it only to provide their service to us.
privacy.s5Body: Media is kept in private storage until the event or the host account is deleted. Host account data is kept while the account is active. You can ask us to delete your data at any time (see contact). Some minimal logs may be kept briefly for security and then removed.
privacy.s6Body: Data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS/TLS) and at rest through our providers, with access limited to what is needed to run the service. No method of storage or transmission is perfectly secure, so we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s7Body: You can ask to access, correct, export or delete your personal data by emailing us. You can manage notification permissions in your device or browser settings. Because Kormem stores no biometric data, there is nothing of that kind to export or delete.
privacy.s8Body: Kormem is not directed to children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect their personal data. If you believe a child has provided data, contact us and we will remove it.
privacy.s9Body: Kormem is a test version and this policy may change as the product develops. We will update this page and note material changes here. Continued use after changes take effect means you accept the updated policy.
privacy.contact: Questions or requests: admin@korme.org. We aim to respond within a few days.

try.title: Your camera is already waiting.
try.subtitle: The same camera guests get after scanning the QR: photo, a short clip or a voice wish. Every take stays on your device.
try.afterShot: Developed. At a real event this lands in the shared gallery instantly, for everyone to see.
try.denied: Allow camera access in your browser to try the demo.
try.voiceHint: Up to {seconds}s. Tap the button and say your wish.
try.voiceListen: Listen back. At a real event this would join the gallery.
try.micDenied: Allow microphone access in your browser to try voice wishes.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms cover your use of Kormem, a free web-based shared camera for events. By using Kormem you agree to them. Kormem is currently a test version offered free of charge.
terms.s1Body: Kormem lets a host create an event, share a QR code or link, and collect photos, short videos and voice messages from guests into one live shared gallery. It runs in the browser; no app install is required. Features may change, pause or break while we develop and test the product.
terms.s2Body: Hosts sign in with email or Google. Keep your access secure; you are responsible for activity under your account. Tell us at admin@korme.org if you suspect unauthorized use. Guests take part without an account, identified only by a device token stored on their device.
terms.s3Body: Kormem is free during this test period. There are no purchases, subscriptions or fees. Because it is a test version, it may have downtime, bugs, or changes, and we may add, remove or reset features. Do not rely on it as your only copy of important media.
terms.s4Body: The camera and microphone are used only when you choose to capture something, and only with the permission your device grants. "Find my photos" uses your camera on-device and uploads nothing. You are responsible for your own mobile data and any carrier charges.
terms.s5Body: You own the photos, videos and voice messages you capture. To run the service, you grant Kormem a limited, royalty-free license to host, process, store and display your content as needed to operate the event and gallery. A host receives a license to use media uploaded to their event only for viewing, sharing and downloading that event. Do not upload content you do not have the right to share.
terms.s6Body: Do not use Kormem to break the law or violate others' rights; upload unlawful, infringing, harassing, hateful, sexually explicit or extremely violent content; upload other people's photos without their permission; impersonate others; or interfere with, overload, scrape or reverse-engineer the service. We may remove content or suspend access that breaks these terms.
terms.s7Body: Kormem is not a backup service. Keep your own copies of anything important. We are not responsible for content that is lost, deleted, or unavailable.
terms.s8Body: The service is provided "as is" and "as available," without warranties of any kind, to the fullest extent allowed by law. As a free test version, it may be interrupted or contain errors. To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
terms.s9Body: We may update these terms as the product develops and will note material changes here. You may stop using Kormem at any time. We may suspend or end access, or remove content, if we believe these terms or the law have been broken.
terms.s10Body: Questions about these terms: admin@korme.org. We aim to respond within a few days.
terms.contact: By using Kormem you agree to these terms.
